top_signals.title: Fed Chairman Warsh says he meets 'often' with Trump administration, defends independence
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh said Wednesday that he speaks with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent frequently outside their regular weekly meetings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Historic IBM stock crash sets up unique options strategy
top_signals.summary: IBM shares fell just over $73 to ~$217 — a jaw-dropping 25% single-day decapitation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Ostium pauses trading as security firms report multimillion-dollar oracle exploit
top_signals.summary: Ostium halted trading and advised revoking contract approvals after blockchain security firms reported an apparent oracle-related exploit of its OLP liquidity vault, with estimated losses ranging from $18 million to $22 million.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
